entity.label: Kerioth-hezron
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:25). Judas the traitor was probably a native of this place, and hence his name Iscariot. It has been identified with the ruins of el-Kureitein, about 10 miles south of Hebron.

nodes.label: Kerioth-hezron
nodes.description: A town in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:25). Judas the traitor was probably a native of this place, and hence his name Iscariot. It has been identified with the ruins of el-Kureitein, about 10 miles south of Hebron.

verses.text: And Hazor, Hadattah, and Kerioth, and Hezron, which is Hazor,
